rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Of Defendant B.E. Development Corporation
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 13, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's motion to tax costs of defendant B.E. Development Corp.: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/GLW)
